title: Fashion Photographer
description:
Join Our Creative Journey

Are you passionate about capturing moments that bring fashion to life? We’re looking for a highly creative Photographer to join our dynamic in-house creative team. This is your opportunity to make an impact in a fast-paced fashion environment — producing visually compelling content that defines our brand across digital and retail platforms.

What You’ll Do

· Conceptualize, plan, and execute high-quality fashion and product photography for e-commerce, campaigns, and social media

· Lead both studio and on-location shoots — including styling, lighting, set-up, and editing

· Collaborate closely with the creative, marketing, and e-commerce teams to deliver visuals that align with brand direction and storytelling

· Source, style, and curate props and locations to elevate each shoot

· Handle post-production — including photo retouching, color correction, and video editing

· Maintain and manage studio equipment and ensure all gear is in top condition

Who You Are

· A strong visual storyteller with a sharp eye for aesthetics, detail, and composition

· Proficient in tools such as Photoshop, Lightroom, Illustrator, Capture One, Final Cut Pro X, After Effects, or similar editing software

· Experienced in commercial fashion photography (portfolio required)

· Adept at managing multiple projects under tight deadlines in a fast-moving environment

· Creative, collaborative, and hands-on — you’re a team player who enjoys bouncing ideas and growing with the team

· Experience in fashion styling, visual direction, or art direction is a strong advantage

Why Join Us?

· Be part of a fashion-forward brand that values creativity and individuality

· Work in a collaborative and passionate team where your ideas are heard

· Create content that lives across major fashion platforms and makes a visible brand impact

Ready to bring your lens to our brand story?

Submit your CV and portfolio of works for consideration. We can’t wait to see your creativity in action.

postedCompany.description:
Company Overview

 

We are a fast growing chain-stores retailer of ladies fashion footwear. Established in 2001, PAZZION caters to the modern, sophisticated trend-setter with an uncompromising standard for taste and quality. High-caliber craftsmanship and an unwavering attention to detail mean each pair of shoes is painstakingly designed to bring you the best in style and comfort. PAZZION is available in major retail malls across SINGAPORE with its flagship outlet at Wisma Atria Orchard Road. Internationally, PAZZION’s presence can be found in Brunei, Cambodia, Indonesia, Japan, Mauritius, South Korea, Thailand and Vietnam.

 

Our Mission and Vision

 

PAZZION’s Vision is to establish itself as a recognizable international brand, known
for its high-quality products that push the envelope of fashion trends.

 

We aim to offer trendy, fashion-forward footwear and accessories with an
emphasis on quality, style and value.
